schema_defaults.negative_scenario: obligation omitted, collapsed, widened, or reassigned
schema_defaults.unknown_scenario: fail_closed, not_evaluable, or explicit human disposition
schema_defaults.restrictive_consequence: block conformance or require human disposition
schema_defaults.prohibited_automatic_promotion: no artifact, finding, runtime state, or repository metadata self-promotes into Authority or lifecycle status
schema_defaults.public_private_rule: public text does not fabricate or disclose private-L0 doctrine
